Non-Reimbursable Overtime Adopted Budget YTD December 2025

payload.claim_text: Toll revenue was slightly favorable to the year-end forecast in part due to higher average revenue per vehicle.
payload.subject: Vehicle Toll Revenue

payload.claim_text: Higher than anticipated short-term investment returns on fund balances.
payload.subject: Investment Income

tool_args.label: Maintenance and Other Operating Contracts Variance

payload.claim_text: Lower expenses were primarily due to lower than forecasted costs for E-ZPass Customer Service Center related costs ($6.338M), the timing of Major Maintenance costs ($5.303M), E-ZPass tags ($2.177M), and the maintenance of E-ZPass equipment ($0.848M).
payload.subject: Maintenance and Other Operating Contracts

payload.claim_text: December 2025 year-to-date overtime is higher than the Final Forecast by $2.0 million (6.7%) primarily due to a rise in employee attrition and higher required vacancy coverage.
payload.subject: Non-Reimbursable Overtime

payload.claim_text: December 2025 year-to-date overtime is $0.3 million (24.8%) lower than both the Final Forecast and Adopted Budget largely due to less capital project activities.
payload.subject: Reimbursable Overtime
